description: Emitted by T83 ListingPublisher after audit record (ORDER 1), content safety check (ORDER 2), and storeDocument (ORDER 3) succeed. price >= 0 required; price === 0 valid (free listing).

version.description: Listing version — used in T84 version-keyed idempotency key

piiGuard: No seller name, email, or pricing data in event payload. listingId and tenantId are opaque references.
arbiterRef: arb-flow08-audit-before-moderation: audit at ORDER 1. arb-flow08-zero-price-accepted: price === 0 is valid.
